subject: A large, shirtless humanoid giant crouches between farm buildings, eating a red apple from one hand while holding another piece of fruit with the other. Two small cowering figures huddle against the building in the foreground.
description: A large, shirtless humanoid figure — noticeably oversized relative to the farmstead architecture around them — crouches in a rural yard between timber-framed buildings with red-clay tile roofs. They bite into a round red fruit with an open mouth and wide eyes suggesting ravenous hunger. A second piece of fruit sits in their other hand; scattered produce is visible on the ground around them. In the lower foreground, two small figures — appearing to be farmers or peasants — huddle together against the building wall, one raising a hand defensively as if shielding themselves. A pig-like animal is visible fleeing to the right edge. The sky is open and light behind the scene.
foreground: Two cowering small figures huddled against a farm building wall, scattered produce on dirt ground
background: Rural farmstead with timber-frame buildings, pale open sky, hills in far distance
emotion: The large figure shows wide-eyed ravenous hunger; the smaller figures show fear and cowering desperation
